case_title: SIAOSI TOFI VS. LAIDLAW EDUCATION SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-10-2005 CONTINUED TO MAR-14-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-14-2005 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVER SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No apperance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior, CSR 129. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Continued To Mar-14-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/14/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Romy Barulich. (212)
